scope: ACT1 opening through Caligo art test

rules.nativePixelArtMixing: not allowed within the same route
rules.gameplayEdge: clear value edge at the fixed collision baseline
rules.textureFrequency: large and medium forms first; suppress isolated high-frequency tile noise
rules.materials: wood, blackened iron, masonry and toxic liquid must remain visually distinct
rules.lighting: cool ambient structure with restrained warm practical lamps

note: Perceptual consistency is achieved in source art, not by blurring mixed styles at import.
